Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses And Documents Production And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. DefendantBest Towing and Cheuk Lau's motion to compel responses to request for production of documents is granted. Plaintiff is ordered serve supplemental verified responses and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. If no responsive documents exist, plaintiff shall comply with CCP 2031.230. The Court finds that plaintiff failed to respond to discovery and produce documents in a timely fashion. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $760 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.
